code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    macd_fast = params.get('macd_fast', 12)
    macd_slow = params.get('macd_slow', 26)
    psar_step = params.get('psar_step', 0.02)
    psar_max = params.get('psar_max', 0.2)
    
    macd = ta.trend.macd(df['close'], window_slow=macd_slow, window_fast=macd_fast)
    macd_line = macd['macd']
    signal_line = macd['macd_signal']
    
    psar = ta.trend.psar(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], step=psar_step, max_step=psar_max)
    
    long_entry = (macd_line > signal_line) & (df['close'] > psar)
    short_entry = (macd_line < signal_line) & (df['close'] < psar)
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[long_entry] = 1
    signals[short_entry] = -1
    
    return signals.fillna(0).astype(int)
rationale: Combines MACD trend confirmation with Parabolic SAR reversal signals for AUD/USD, capturing both momentum and reversal points in this commodity currency pair.
